privacy_meta_desc: Learn how OneForMind protects your data and ensures your security.
privacy_meta_og_desc: Your habits, your data, our protection.
privacy_subtitle: We build tools to help you take control of your life, not to exploit your personal information. Transparency is our default.
privacy_tldr_1_desc: We never sell your personal information or financial data to third parties.
privacy_tldr_2_desc: You own your data. You can export or permanently delete your account at any time.
privacy_tldr_3_desc: Your financial records and habits are encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_tldr_4_desc: We only use essential cookies to keep you logged in and functional analytics.
privacy_doc_intro: This Privacy Policy describes how OneForMind collects and uses your personal information.
privacy_p_collection: We believe in data minimization. We only collect what is strictly necessary.
privacy_li_collection_2_strong: Habits, finances, journals, and planner tasks.
privacy_li_collection_2_desc: All your productivity progress is stored securely.
privacy_li_collection_3_desc: IP address and browser type for bug diagnosis.
privacy_p_usage: Your data is used to provide the core experience.
privacy_li_usage_3: Anonymous usage analytics for UI/UX improvements.
privacy_finance_note_desc: Your financial data is processed with additional AES-256 encryption. We never store credit card numbers directly; all are processed via official payment gateway partners.
privacy_p_security: We enforce HTTPS/SSL and modern hashing for passwords.
privacy_p_thirdparty: We share data only with essential operators like Payment Gateways and Google OAuth.
privacy_p_rights: Subject to jurisdiction, you may access or delete your data.
privacy_li_rights_3: Request permanent deletion of account and all data.
privacy_export_desc: You have the full right to take your data with you if you choose to leave OneForMind.
privacy_export_point_1: Export financial transactions to CSV/Excel formats.
privacy_export_point_2: Export habit logs and journals to PDF or JSON formats.
privacy_p_contact: Questions? Reach out to our team.
privacy_faq_1_q: Can your team read my journals?
privacy_faq_1_a: No. Strict internal controls ensure your content remains private.
privacy_faq_2_a: Absolutely not. Our business is productivity tools, not data brokerage.
privacy_faq_3_q: How do I delete my account?
privacy_faq_3_a: Use the Profile Settings to wipe all data from our servers instantly.
privacy_cta_desc: Join thousands who trust us with their daily routines.
terms_meta_title: Binding Terms of Service - OneForMind OS
terms_meta_desc: Comprehensive legal contract for OneForMind users. Maximum protection for the provider.
terms_meta_og_desc: Legally binding agreement for all users.
terms_subtitle: By accessing OneForMind, you explicitly agree to these terms. This document is a binding contract between you and the service provider.
terms_notice_desc: OneForMind provides a 14-day Free Trial for all new users to evaluate the service. Once you have made a deposit or subscription payment, you waive the right to request a refund in any form. All transactions are FINAL.
terms_intro_text: Welcome to OneForMind. These Terms of Service ('Terms') form the legal basis of our relationship.
terms_intro_sub: Please read carefully. By using our service, you agree to be bound by every clause. Disagreement with any part leads to immediate revocation of your right to use the Service.
terms_p_eligibility: Service is provided 'as-is'. You must be:
terms_eligibility_1: At least 13 years old (accepting full liability)
terms_eligibility_2: Using the app for lawful purposes only
terms_p_rules: We reserve the right to terminate accounts without prior notice for any perceived violation.
terms_rules_do_2: Accept full responsibility for all data entered.
terms_rules_do_3: Acknowledge that productivity results are personal.
terms_rules_dont_1: Attempting reverse engineering or security probing.
terms_rules_dont_2: Abusing AI features or mass automation.
terms_rules_dont_3: Filing legal claims before mandatory internal mediation.
terms_p_payment: OneForMind premium features are instant digital content and are non-refundable.
terms_li_payment_1_desc: Subscriptions renew automatically. Failure to cancel before the billing date is solely the user's responsibility and does not grant refund rights.
terms_li_payment_2_desc: We provide explicit 14-day Free Access (Trial). By purchasing, you waive all rights to a refund under any circumstances.
terms_p_intellectual: All code, UI/UX designs, and operational concepts are our exclusive property. Unauthorized use will be prosecuted.
terms_p_termination: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, without prior notice or liability, if you breach these Terms or at our sole discretion to protect system integrity.
terms_p_dispute: All disputes shall be settled via binding internal mediation or arbitration in Indonesian jurisdiction. You waive the right to Class Action lawsuits.
terms_legal_caps: THIS SERVICE IS PROVIDED 'AS-IS' WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR FINANCIAL LOSS, PLAN FAILURES, OR DATA ISSUES. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY IS LIMITED TO YOUR LAST SUBSCRIPTION FEE.
terms_cta_desc: By clicking below, you acknowledge full acceptance of this binding legal contract.
terms_cta_note: This agreement is binding from account creation.
sec_meta_desc: Bank-grade encryption and architectural security protocols.
sec_meta_og_desc: Your mind deserves a safe space.
sec_subtitle: Security is our bedrock. We protect your most sensitive data with layered architecture and professional protocols.
sec_alert_desc: Found a security flaw? Report it to our team and help us keep the ecosystem safe.
sec_p_infrastructure: Hosted in world-class data centers with maximum uptime and physical security.
sec_li_infra_2_desc: Advanced firewalls and DDoS protection protocols.
sec_li_infra_3_desc: Daily encrypted snapshots for zero-loss scenarios.
sec_p_encryption: Sensitive entries like journals and finances are encrypted using AES-256.
sec_li_enc_1_desc: All data in transit is shielded.
sec_li_enc_2_desc: Passwords remain unreadable even by staff.
sec_p_application: Built with frameworks that prevent SQL Injection and XSS attacks.
sec_li_app_2_desc: Token-based protection for every sensitive action.
sec_p_sovereignty: We do not sell data. We do not have 'backdoors' to view your private notes.
sec_cta_desc: Focus on growth, we handle the shield.
refund_meta_desc: Transparent rules regarding our strictly final digital sales.
refund_meta_og_desc: Final payment policy for OneForMind users.
refund_subtitle: Since we provide an explicit 14-day Free Trial, all payments processed after the trial are final and non-refundable.
refund_intro_text: We prioritize transparency. You have 14 days of full access to determine if the product fits your needs before making a purchase.
refund_p_guarantee: As a digital content provider, all purchases of Pro or Lifetime plans are final. We assume you used the Free Trial to verify the product's suitability.
refund_li_guarantee_2: The trial period replaces the need for a refund policy.
refund_p_process: Users are solely responsible for canceling their subscriptions to avoid future charges.
refund_li_process_3: Confirm return to the Free status.
refund_p_cancellation: We cannot override refund policies of external payment processors or app stores.
refund_li_cancellation_1: Negligence in canceling is not grounds for a refund.
refund_li_cancellation_2: Manual account deletion doesn't trigger a refund of the remaining balance.
refund_p_exclusion: In the event of total system failure (>7 days), we may, at our sole discretion, offer duration extensions. No cash refunds.
refund_cta_desc: By subscribing, you waive all rights to a refund claim.
refund_merchant_protection_desc: Your transaction is protected by digital transactional legal standards stating that digital products, once accessed/used, are non-refundable.
